actions.detail: Validated wp-20260304-mid-egress-lovable-rewire. orbt_mode=repair, execution_type=standard, architectural_flag=true, requires_pressure_test=true. Deviation noted: doc_surface='repo_markdown' not in schema enum.
Read types.ts, adapter-resolver.ts, mailgun-adapter.ts, heyreach-adapter.ts, sales-handoff-adapter.ts, index.ts. 3 direct adapters (MG, HR, SH) with shared AdapterPayload/AdapterResponse types.
Added 5 new fields to AdapterPayload: frame_id, lifecycle_phase, sovereign_company_id, company_name, agent_number. These match the Lovable contract request_fields.

Created lovable-delivery-adapter.ts. Single adapter using LOVABLE_DELIVERY_URL env var (Doppler). Maps AdapterPayload to Lovable contract: subject→subject_line, body_text→body_plain. Returns AdapterResponse from Lovable response.
All channels (MG, HR, SH) now route through single LovableDeliveryAdapter instance. Removed per-channel adapter instantiation. Old adapters deprecated but retained.
Extended AdapterPayload in deliverSingleMessage() with frame_id, lifecycle_phase, sovereign_company_id, company_name, agent_number sourced from CID row.
Added runCidSidMidDryRun() to cid-sid-mid-cron.ts. Checks all 15 Lovable contract fields across CID, SID, and MID_HANDOFF phases. Logs PASS/FAIL per field per communication_id.

Verified 3 supabase functions: lcs-mailgun-webhook (HMAC + CET + engagement signals), lcs-heyreach-webhook (API key + CET + reply signals), lcs-inbound-reply (webhook secret + CET + reply signals). All write correctly to CET (lcs.event) at step 8/9. No modifications needed.
Produced doc_artifact.json documenting adapter architecture changes and DRY_RUN mode.
Produced changeset.json (1 created, 5 modified) and this execution log.

deviations.detail: WORK_PACKET.doc_surface='repo_markdown' not in work_packet.schema.json enum. Processed as-is per WP authority.
